"My tailor shop excels at fixing and 'fixing' dolls. Am I right, Muddles?"

(Melissa deals 125% damage to Minions, Creeps, and Summoned Units.)

skill.name: Falling!
skill.description:
"Watch me slide forward and increase my Attack Speed for 3 seconds— Ah, that was just boring…"

"<font color="a6aafb">Muddles</font>, go that way!"
"<font color="a6aafb">Cuddles</font>, come here!"

(The skill's cooldown is reduced by 0.5s each time Melissa damages the enemy by attacking <font color="a6aafb">Muddles</font>.)

skill.name: Eyes on You!
skill.description:
The plan's like this: Throw <font color="a6aafb">Muddles</font> out to hold down the bad guys, and then… I come on stage!
"I puncture the bad guys, while <font color="a6aafb">Giggles</font> hit <font color="a6aafb">Muddles</font> to punish them as well! Hee, fantastic!"

(<font color="a6aafb">Muddles</font> deals 250<font color="fba51f"> (+80% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> on the first hit and links nearby enemies for up to 6s. Linked enemies are slowed by 60% that decays over 1.5s and can break the link by moving out of the range. <font color="a6aafb">Muddles</font> will return to Melissa early when there are no enemies around and immediately if she's too far away. When <font color="a6aafb">Muddles</font> is present, you can tap the <font color="a6aafb">Attack Minion</font> button to directly attack <font color="a6aafb">Muddles</font>, though it cannot trigger the multi-hit damage. <font color="a6aafb">Giggles</font> only hits <font color="a6aafb">Muddles</font> when Melissa has a target for her Basic Attack.)

skill.name: Go Away!
skill.description:
<font color="a6aafb">Cuddles</font>, protect me! For 4 seconds, let no bad guys come close. Unless I say otherwise!

(When activated, the field knocks back enemies in the area and deals them 500<font color="62f8fe"> (+100% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font>. It'll then continuously knock back enemies who attempt to enter the field, dealing them 50<font color="62f8fe"> (+10% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> and briefly slowing them. The field will also interrupt the enemy's movement skills unless they're immune to control effects. The field will move with Melissa once, when she's about to move out of the boundary.
<font color="a6aafb">Passive</font>: Melissa's Physical & Magic Defense are increased by 3. This effect is increased to 5 times when the skill is active.)

skill_combo.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS
skill_combo.description:
Link enemies with her 2nd Skill for increased damage.
Use 1st Skill to keep them linked and her Ultimate
to stop enemies from getting close.

skill_combo.title: LANING COMBOS
skill_combo.description:
Link the enemy with her 2nd Skill and use
Basic Attacks to deal extra damage. 
Chase enemies trying to flee with her 1st Skill.

lore.story: Former member of the Knights of Light who's determined to forge a path of his own.

skill.name: Transcendence
skill.description:
Xavier enhances his subsequent skills each time his skill hits an enemy hero. <font color="a6aafb">Stage I:</font> Increases Movement Speed by 50% when subsequent skills hit, decaying over 1.2s. <font color="a6aafb">Stage II:</font> Width of subsequent skills will be greatly increased. <font color="a6aafb">Stage III:</font> Skill Cooldown reduced by 4s (36s for the Ultimate). At <font color="a6aafb">Stage III</font>, Xavier enters the <font color="a6aafb">Transcendence</font> state.

<font color="a6aafb">Transcendence:</font> All of Xavier's skills are enhanced to <font color="a6aafb">Stage III</font> state for 5s (this duration is extended by 1s each time Xavier's skill hits an enemy).

skill.name: Infinite Extension
skill.description:
Xavier fires a Mystic Bullet that deals 480<font color="62f8fe"> (+100% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> to enemies it passes through.

The Bullet's flying distance increases each time it hits an enemy or the <font color="a6aafb">Mystic Barrier</font> (up to 5 times).

skill.name: Mystic Field
skill.description:
Xavier conjures a <font color="a6aafb">Mystic Barrier</font> that lasts 5s. Enemies that come into contact with the Barrier will take 220<font color="62f8fe"> (+65% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> and be slowed by 50%, while allies will gain 50% extra Movement Speed that decays over 1.2s.
When hit by Xavier's other skills, the Barrier expands into a <font color="a6aafb">Mystic Field</font> for 3s, dealing 220<font color="62f8fe"> (+65% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> to enemies within and immobilizing them for 0.8s.

skill.name: Dawning Light
skill.description:
Xavier unleashes a beam of Mystic magic in the target direction, dealing 600<font color="62f8fe"> (+180% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> to all enemies along its path.

Once cast, he also directly enters the <font color="a6aafb">Transcendence</font> state and resets the state's duration.

skill_combo.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS
skill_combo.description: Cast Xavier's Ultimate to enter or refresh Transcendence, then try to hit as many enemies as possible with his 2nd Skill, and follow up with his 1st Skill to create a forbidden field to immobilize enemies. Continue casting his 1st Skill to extend Transcendence's duration while going for kills.

skill_combo.title: LANING COMBOS
skill_combo.description: In the laning phase, Xavier possesses great poke with his 1st Skill and can utilize the slow from his 2nd Skill to make targets easier to hit. This combination allows him to quickly reach Transcendence. When the opportunity arises, use his Ultimate to finish off an enemy and while in Transcendence state.

lore.story: A Raven assassin of the Church of Light, a young boy who's in search of his home…

skill.name: Smith's Legacy
skill.description:
After casting two different skills, Julian enhances his third skill. Casting the enhanced skill makes all his skills go on a 9-6s Cooldown (decreases with his level).
After casting any skill, his Basic Attacks for the next 2s will deal 100<font color="fba51f"> (+100% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="62f8fe">(+100% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> and pull the target toward him (deals 85% damage to Creeps). Casting another skill extends the duration.
Julian gains 15% extra Hybrid Lifesteal for 5s each time he hits an enemy hero with his skills (up to 3 stacks).

skill.name: Scythe
skill.description:
Julian hurls a flying scythe in the target direction, dealing 420<font color="62f8fe"> (+140% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> to enemies along the way and slowing them by 30% for 1s.
The scythe disappears upon hitting a non-minion enemy.

skill.name: Sword
skill.description: Julian summons a flying sword and dashes in the target direction, dealing 400<font color="62f8fe"> (+80% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> to enemies along the way.

skill.name: Chain
skill.description: Julian casts chains at the target location, dealing 300<font color="62f8fe"> (+100% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> to enemies hit after a short delay and immobilizing them for 1.2s.

skill.name: Smith's Legacy
skill.description:
After casting two different skills, Julian enhances his third skill. Casting the enhanced skill makes all his skills go on a 9-6s Cooldown (decreases with his level).
After casting any skill, his Basic Attacks for the next 2s will deal 100<font color="fba51f"> (+100% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="62f8fe">(+100% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> and pull the target toward him (deals 85% damage to Creeps). Casting another skill extends the duration.
Julian gains 15% extra Hybrid Lifesteal for 5s each time he hits an enemy hero with his skills (up to 3 stacks).

skill.name: Enhanced Scythe
skill.description:
Julian hurls enhanced scythes in the target direction, dealing 420<font color="62f8fe"> (+140% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> to enemies along the way and slowing them by 50% for 1s.
Upon hitting a non-minion enemy or reaching the maximum distance, the scythes will continue to fly at a lower speed, dealing 80<font color="62f8fe"> (+30% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> every 0.3s to nearby enemies (up to 8 times).

skill.name: Enhanced Sword
skill.description:
Julian summons a large number of flying swords and dashes in the target direction, dealing 75<font color="62f8fe"> (+15% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> every 0.1s to enemies along the way (up to 9 times).
Julian's untargetable and invisible during the dash.

skill.name: Enhanced Chain
skill.description:
Julian casts chains at the target location, dealing 40<font color="62f8fe"> (+10% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> every 0.2s to enemies hit and slowing them by 30%.
Enemies that are still in the area at the end of the skill duration will take 250<font color="62f8fe"> (+100% Total Magic Power)</font> extra <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> and be knocked airborne for 0.8s.

skill_combo.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS
skill_combo.description: In teamfights, Julian can slow the enemy with his 1st Skill before dashing into the enemy battle formation with his 2nd Skill. Then use his enhanced 3rd Skill for area CC.

skill_combo.title: LANING COMBOS
skill_combo.description: In the laning phase, Julian can use his 2nd Skill to close in on the enemy, and his 3rd Skill to immobilize them. Then he can use his enhanced 1st Skill to deal damage. Follow up with his enhanced Basic Attacks to prevent the enemy from escaping.

lore.story: A master treasure appraiser in Los Pecados accumulating wealth and searching for his lost friend.

skill.name: Crystalline Armor
skill.description:
Fredrinn gains 1 <font color="a6aafb">Combo Point</font> that lasts 5s each time his skill hits a non-minion enemy, up to 4 <font color="a6aafb">Combo Points</font>. His Ultimates cost different numbers of <font color="a6aafb">Combo Points</font>.

Fredrinn stores 100% of the damage he receives as <font color="a6aafb">Crystal Energy</font>, which decays after 5s at a rate of 10% Max HP per second.
Fredrinn can convert the stored <font color="a6aafb">Crystal Energy</font> into HP by 20% of his damage dealt (10% for damage dealt to minions). Gaining a <font color="a6aafb">Combo Point</font> resets the decaying timer.

skill.name: Piercing Strike
skill.description:
Fredrinn thrusts his sword in the target direction, dealing 125<font color="26e407"> (+7% Total HP)</font> <font color="fba51f">(+120% Extra Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to enemies hit and slowing them by 30% for 2s. His next Basic Attack gains extra attack range and deals 85<font color="fba51f"> (+100% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>.
This skill deals 200% damage to non-hero enemies.

skill.name: Brave Assault
skill.description: Fredrinn dashes in the target direction, dealing 140<font color="fba51f"> (+80% Extra Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to the first non-minion enemy hit. His next Basic Attack knocks the target airborne for 0.3s.

skill.name: Energy Eruption
skill.description:
Fredrinn deals 210<font color="fba51f"> (+100% Extra Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to nearby enemies and taunts them for 1s. Hitting a non-minion enemy grants Fredrinn 25 Physical & Magic Defense for 3s and reduces the cooldowns of <font color="a6aafb">Piercing Strike</font> and <font color="a6aafb">Brave Assault</font> by 75%.
This skill costs 1 <font color="a6aafb">Combo Point</font>.

skill.name: Appraiser's Wrath
skill.description:
Fredrinn slams his sword in the target direction (this skill can only be interrupted by Suppression), dealing 600 plus 21% of his <font color="a6aafb">Crystal Energy</font> as <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to enemies in a fan-shaped area after a short delay. Enemies in the center of the area take 175% damage. This skill doubles the conversion ratio based on damage dealt to enemy heroes from stored <font color="a6aafb">Crystal Energy</font> to HP.
This skill costs 3 <font color="a6aafb">Combo Points</font>.

skill_combo.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS
skill_combo.description: In teamfights, Fredrinn should use his 2nd Skill to close in on the enemy hero and knock them airborne, then use his 1st Skill and 1st Ultimate for CC and cooldown reset. Use his enhanced Basic Attacks, 1st and 2nd skills sequentially to deal heavy damage, and finish with his 2nd Ultimate after knocking the enemy airborne for the kill.

skill_combo.title: LANING COMBOS
skill_combo.description: In the laning phase, Fredrinn can dash to the enemy hero with his 2nd Skill, and knock that hero airborne with the enhanced Basic Attack. Then follow up with his 1st Skill to deal damage.

lore.story: The "Child of Miracle" who returned to the Leonins after years of wandering.

skill.name: Humph, Joy's Angry!
skill.description:
Joy becomes <font color="a6aafb">Angry!</font> each time her skill hits a non-Minion enemy, dealing 100<font color="62f8fe"> (+80% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> and increasing her Movement Speed by 60% that decays over 4s (hitting the <font color="a6aafb">Leonin Crystal</font> will also grant the Movement Speed effect). This effect has a cooldown of 4s for each target.

Joy's Basic Attack will deal 65<font color="fba51f"> (+65% Total Physical Attack)</font>  <font color="62f8fe">(+65% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font>.

skill.name: Look, Leonin Crystal!
skill.description: Joy summons a <font color="a6aafb">Leonin Crystal</font> at the target location, dealing 200<font color="62f8fe"> (+40% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> to nearby enemies and slowing them by 30% for 1s. The <font color="a6aafb">Leonin Crystal</font> lasts up to 2s.

skill.name: Meow, Rhythm of Joy!
skill.description:
Joy dashes in the target direction, dealing 120<font color="62f8fe"> (+40% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> to enemies in her path. Hitting an enemy or the <font color="a6aafb">Leonin Crystal</font> allows Joy to cast this skill again within 0.8s and gain 1 <font color="a6aafb">Beat Energy</font>. Casting this skill on the beat increases the skill damage by 100% and grants a 80<font color="62f8fe"> (+60% Total Magic Power)</font> shield that lasts 3s.

This skill can be cast up to 4 times in succession.

skill.name: Ha, Electrifying Beats!
skill.description:
Joy increases her Physical & Magic Defense by 15<font color="62f8fe"> (+10% Total Magic Power)</font> and gains 30% Movement Speed. Over the next 3s, she pulses 8 times, dealing 120<font color="62f8fe"> (+40% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> each time to nearby enemies.
Each <font color="a6aafb">Meow, Rhythm of Joy!</font> cast on the beat increases this skill's damage by 40%. If perfect rhythm is achieved by hitting every beat with <font color="a6aafb">Meow, Rhythm of Joy!</font>, Joy also gains 40% Spell Vamp while this skill is active.
This skill unlocks when Joy acquires <font color="a6aafb">Beat Energy</font>. Casting this skill with 3 <font color="a6aafb">Beat Energy</font> will remove all debuffs on Joy and make her immune to slow effects while this skill is active.

skill_combo.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS
skill_combo.description: In teamfights, Joy should summon a Leonin Crystal with her 1st Skill and use it as a springboard for her 2nd Skill to enter the battle. Continue to chain her 2nd Skill on the beat to unlock her Ultimate. Finally, use her Ultimate to finish off the enemy.

skill_combo.title: LANING COMBOS
skill_combo.description: In the laning phase, Joy should place her 1st Skill on top of the enemy, then use her 2nd Skill to dash through both targets and continue to chain her 2nd Skill on the beat for damage.

lore.story: The young girl who seeks to rebuild the Star Atlas in order to solve the secrets of the Stars.

skill.name: Star Trail
skill.description: <font color="a6aafb">Astral Sphere</font> continuously slows nearby enemies by 20% and reveals their position.

skill.name: Astral Meteor
skill.description: Novaria summons an <font color="a6aafb">Astral Sphere</font> at the target location, dealing 75<font color="62f8fe"> (+25% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> every 0.33s and applying a continuously increasing slow effect (up to 2.5 times the original). After 2s, the <font color="a6aafb">Astral Sphere</font> explodes, dealing 260<font color="62f8fe"> (+50% Total Magic Power)</font> (+ 4% target's Max HP) <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> and applying 2.5 times the slow effect.

skill.name: Astral Recall
skill.description:
Novaria summons an <font color="a6aafb">Astral Sphere</font> at a distance and draws it towards herself. She gains 20% Movement Speed and can pass through terrain. Moving through terrain increases the Movement Speed boost to 60%.

Upon catching the <font color="a6aafb">Astral Sphere</font>, Novaria can launch the <font color="a6aafb">Star Shatter</font> in the target direction within 5s. The sphere will explode when hitting an enemy hero, dealing 230<font color="62f8fe"> (+90% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> plus 4% of the target's Max HP. The damage will increase based on the <font color="a6aafb">Astral Sphere</font>'s travel distance (during both draw and launch), up to 2.5 times the original damage.

skill.name: Astral Echo
skill.description: Novaria scatters <font color="a6aafb">Astral Echo</font> in the target direction, briefly slowing enemy heroes hit by 50% while applying <font color="a6aafb">Astral Ring</font> on them. It increases targets' hitbox by 2.5 times and reveals their position for 5s.

skill_combo.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS
skill_combo.description: In teamfights, use Novaria's Ultimate to gain vision of the battlefield, then summon an Astral Sphere with her 2nd Skill. After catching the Astral Sphere, launch it to damage the enemy and use her 1st Skill to thwart enemy heroes that try to get close.

skill_combo.title: LANING COMBOS
skill_combo.description: In the laning phase, initiate by using Novaria's 2nd Skill to gain extra Movement Speed and summon an Astral Sphere. Then, slow the enemy with her 1st Skill and use her 2nd Skill again to launch the Astral Sphere to deal damage.

lore.story: A demon human hybrid wielding two lances with a thirst for vengeance against both the Church and demons.

skill.name: Demon Gaze
skill.description:
Arlott possesses a demonic eye that will <font color="a6aafb">Mark</font> enemy units near Arlott that become affected by control effects for 7s.
The eye will also automatically <font color="a6aafb">Mark</font> a nearby enemy hero in vision every 7s.

skill.name: Dauntless Strike
skill.description: Arlott swings his lance forward, dealing 200<font color="fba51f"> (+60% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> and briefly stunning targets in an area. Targets hit by the farther part of the AOE will be stunned for 1s instead.

skill.name: Vengeance
skill.description:
Arlott charges at an enemy, dealing 135<font color="fba51f"> (+60% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> (this skill cannot be interrupted during movement).
If Arlott's target is <font color="a6aafb">Marked</font>, he gains a brief burst of Movement Speed, and this skill will deal double damage, immediately refresh its cooldown, and recover 70<font color="fba51f"> (+60% Total Physical Attack)</font> HP to Arlott (only restores 50% of that amount when used on a non-hero unit).

skill.name: Final Slash
skill.description:
<font color="a6aafb">Passive</font>: Each level-up reduces <font color="a6aafb">Demon Gaze</font>'s interval by 1s.
<font color="a6aafb">Active</font>: Arlott cleaves in front of him, dealing 400<font color="fba51f"> (+80% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to targets in the area while pushing them to the end of the AOE and briefly revealing their location (this skill can only be interrupted by Suppression).

skill_combo.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS
skill_combo.description: In teamfights, start by hitting a marked enemy hero with Arlott's 2nd Skill, then get into position to unleash his Ultimate on the enemy team to CC and mark them. Use Arlott's 2nd Skill to cut through the enemy from target to target. When all marks have been used up, use his 1st Skill to CC and mark enemies again, and continue to chain his 2nd Skill.

skill_combo.title: LANING COMBOS
skill_combo.description: In the laning phase, after Arlott's Passive marks an enemy hero, use his 2nd Skill to dash through them and get a cooldown reset. Follow up with his 1st Skill to CC the enemy and mark them again, then hit them with his 2nd Skill while resetting its cooldown.

lore.story: The leader of Bad Soul and self-proclaimed inventor, she wields a homemade weapon powered by a stolen Starlium reactor.

skill.name: Siphon Starlium
skill.description:
Ixia's Basic Attacks and skills apply a stack of <font color="a6aafb">Starlium Charge</font> to enemies on hit. When Ixia performs a Basic Attack on an enemy with two stacks of <font color="a6aafb">Starlium Charge</font>, the attack will consume the stacks and be replaced with <font color="a6aafb">Siphon Starlium</font>, dealing <font color="fba51f"> (+150% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="26e407">(+200 Lifesteal)</font> plus (+10*Hero Level) <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to the target. Ixia recovers HP equal to the damage dealt by <font color="a6aafb">Siphon Starlium</font> (only 10<font color="26e407">(+150 Lifesteal)</font>% against non-hero units) and reduces the target's Movement Speed by 25% for 1s.
<font color="a6aafb">Siphon Starlium</font> can trigger on all enemies in front of Ixia that are within her Basic Attack range, but it cannot Crit.
Ixia's Basic Attacks cannot trigger Lifesteal.

skill.name: Dual Beam
skill.description:
Ixia fires 2 Starlium-charged energy beams along the ground in the target direction, dealing 50<font color="fba51f"> (+70% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to enemies in a rectangular area. When hitting enemy heroes, Ixia gains 50% Movement Speed for 2s.
Enemies hit by both beams will take double damage.

skill.name: Star Helix
skill.description: Ixia unleashes a canister of Starlium energy in the target direction, knocking back nearby enemies, and pulling enemies in range to the center line after a short delay and dealing 200<font color="fba51f"> (+60% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>.

skill.name: Full Barrage
skill.description: Ixia reassembles her weapon into 6 smaller weapons and enters the <font color="a6aafb">Barrage</font> state for 4s. In this state, Ixia's Basic Attacks and skills can hit enemies in the large fan-shaped area in front of her but not outside it. Ixia's Basic Attacks can hit up to 6 enemy units (prioritizes heroes), and <font color="a6aafb">Siphon Starlium</font> will fire simultaneously with her normal Basic Attacks.

skill_combo.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS
skill_combo.description: Choose the perfect location that can secure herself and cast the Ultimate to rain down her attacks on as many enemies as possible. Keep tapping Basic Attack while using her 2nd Skill and 1st Skill to control enemies and deal extra damage.

skill_combo.title: LANING COMBOS
skill_combo.description: Ixia can pull enemies to the center line with her 2nd Skill and follow up with her 1st Skill to deal damage. Use the Movement Speed boost provided by her 1st Skill to chase down enemies.

lore.story: A scholar that wanders the universe with split souls to save his daughter.

skill.name: Dimensional Rift
skill.description:
Nolan's skills will leave a <font color="a6aafb">Rift</font>. When a rift comes into contact with another rift, they will <font color="a6aafb">activate</font> and pull enemies to their center and deal 240<font color="fba51f"> (+140% Extra Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> after a short delay. Each time a rift activation hits an enemy, Nolan will gain 20 Energy. If an enemy is hit by multiple rift activations, the damage after the first hit will be reduced by 40%.
<font color="a6aafb">Cosmic Leap</font>: If Nolan does not deal or take damage for 5s, he enhances his next Basic Attack to dash to the target, dealing <font color="fba51f"> (+120% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> and leaving a <font color="a6aafb">Rift</font>. (Damage to and from Minions or Creeps will not prevent Nolan from getting this effect.)

skill.name: Expansion
skill.description: Nolan cuts a rectangular area in front of him with his cosmic gauge, dealing 230<font color="fba51f"> (+40% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> and leaving a <font color="a6aafb">Rift</font> at the first enemy hit.

skill.name: Gauge
skill.description: Nolan charges in the target direction and slashes with his cosmic gauge, dealing 70<font color="fba51f"> (+13% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to enemies in his path and leaving a <font color="a6aafb">Rift</font>.

skill.name: Fracture
skill.description: Nolan slashes at the target location 3 times, dealing 120<font color="fba51f"> (+50% Extra Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> with each slash while leaving 3 rifts and slowing the target hit by 30% for 0.5s. The rifts will be activated automatically while Nolan dashes backward.

skill_combo.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS
skill_combo.description: In teamfights, approach the enemy using Nolan's 2nd Skill and enhanced Basic Attack, then activate the rift with his 1st Skill. Use Nolan's 2nd Skill to dash through the enemy, and unleash his Ultimate to activate all the rifts while dashing back to safety.

skill_combo.title: LANING COMBOS
skill_combo.description: In the laning phase, use Nolan's 2nd Skill and enhanced Basic Attack to catch the enemy, then use his 1st Skill to activate the rift. Follow up with his 2nd Skill into his 1st Skill to activate another rift explosion.

lore.story: A cheerful performer who spreads fun and wonderment wherever she goes.

skill.name: Performer's Delight
skill.description: Cici generates a stack of Delight after dealing damage, increasing her Movement Speed by 0.75% and Spell Vamp by 0.75% per stack up to 10 times, doubling the effects at full stacks.

skill.name: Yo-Yo Blitz
skill.description:
Cici uses Yoyo to continuously attack the nearest enemy within range (prioritizing heroes) for 3.5s, hitting them up to 10 times, and dealing <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> equal to 60 plus 3<font color="fba51f"> (+1.2% Extra Physical Attack)</font>% of the target's Max HP per hit. Cici can move and use other skills during this attack.

If there is no enemy within range, Yoyo will attack Turrets or the Base instead.

This skill deals 20% extra damage to Minions.

skill.name: Buoyant Bounce
skill.description: Cici leaps to a target location. If she lands on any unit (not including Turrets and Base), she can leap again in the Joystick's direction. If she lands on an enemy with the first leap, she deals 200<font color="fba51f"> (+40% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to them.

skill.name: Curtain Call
skill.description:
Cici throws Yoyo at the target enemy hero and links them with another nearby enemy hero, dealing 100<font color="fba51f"> (+10% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>, slowing them by 30%, and pulling them together for 4s. 

During this time, Cici can use <font color="a6aafb">Yo-Yo Blitz</font> to attack both linked targets at the same time. If only one target is within the range of <font color="a6aafb">Yo-Yo Blitz</font>, Cici will attack the target twice, but the damage of the second attack will be reduced to 25%.

skill_combo.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS
skill_combo.description: In teamfights, find two enemy heroes that are close together and toss Cici's Ultimate on one of them, then use her 2nd Skill to jump in and pop her 1st Skill mid-leap to start dealing continuous damage.

skill_combo.title: LANING COMBOS
skill_combo.description: In the laning phase, use Cici's Basic Attacks to stack some Delight before using her 1st Skill on the opponent, and use her 2nd Skill if they attempt an escape.

lore.story: A carefree, genetically enhanced fox that wields advanced portal technology.

skill.name: Snack Time!
skill.description: Chip starts eating potato chips once every 2s when out of combat, regenerating HP equal to 300 plus 45% of lost HP after finishing a whole bag (requires 4 bites). After eating a bag of chips, Chip will be full and cannot eat again for 5s. (The bite count will be saved if he enters combat before finishing a whole bag.)

skill.name: Crash Course
skill.description: Chip rams his hovercraft into the ground, dealing <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> equal to 100 plus 4% of the target's Max HP and applying <font color="a6aafb">Chip's Mark</font> on enemy units hit. Chip gains a 300<font color="62f8fe"> (+60% Total Magic Power)</font> Shield upon hitting an enemy hero, which increases by 40% for each additional enemy hero hit. Chip's next Basic Attack will become ranged and also hit all nearby enemies with <font color="a6aafb">Chip's Mark</font>, detonating the mark to deal 150<font color="62f8fe"> (+30% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> and stun each target for 0.6s.

skill.name: Overtime
skill.description:
Chip rushes for 2s, gaining up to 65% extra Movement Speed, after which he maintains the max speed for 2s.

Chip's next Basic Attack will cause him to charge at the enemy, dealing 200<font color="62f8fe"> (+30% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> and knocking them back slightly.

skill.name: Shortcut
skill.description:
Chip drops the <font color="a6aafb">Main Portal</font> on an enemy hero, dealing 200<font color="62f8fe"> (+60% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> and briefly slowing them by 25%. The Main Portal deals 2 times the damage and immobilizes them for 1s after a delay. Meanwhile, he creates <font color="a6aafb">Connecting Portals</font> near allied heroes 10 units away and behind the allied Base. The <font color="a6aafb">Main Portal</font> and <font color="a6aafb">Connecting Portals</font> last up to 15s.
<font color="a6aafb">Connecting Portal</font>: Heroes (on both teams) can teleport from <font color="a6aafb">Connecting Portals</font> to the <font color="a6aafb">Main Portal</font>, and allied heroes gain Burst Movement Speed for 1.5s and a 500 shield.
<font color="a6aafb">Main Portal</font>: The Main Portal inherits 70% of Chip's attributes. Heroes can stand on the <font color="a6aafb">Main Portal</font> for 2s to return to the <font color="a6aafb">Connecting Portal</font> they came from. Casting skills or launching Basic Attacks will reset the stand time.

skill.name: Why Walk?
skill.description: Chip has 4 fixed <font color="a6aafb">Beacons</font> on the map when the battle starts. Use this skill to teleport to any other <font color="a6aafb">Beacon</font>. (This skill cannot be used in combat.)

skill_combo.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS
skill_combo.description: In teamfights, use Chip's 2nd Skill preemptively to build up speed, then hit a target with his Basic Attack and deploy the Main Portal with his Ultimate. Follow up with his 1st Skill on the enemy and another Basic Attack to stun them while the Main Portal's delayed effect slows them, and continue the fight as allies portal in.

skill_combo.title: LANING COMBOS
skill_combo.description: When ganking, use Chip's 2nd Skill to quickly get behind the target and knock them into your team with the enhanced Basic Attack, then follow up with his 1st Skill and another Basic Attack to stun them.

lore.story: A mysterious young woman who guides the ember butterflies using her Lantern of Spirits.

skill.name: Crimson Butterflies
skill.description:
Every time Zhuxin channels <font color="a6aafb">Lantern Flare</font>, she converts the Mana spent into up to 15 <font color="a6aafb">Crimson Butterflies</font> to follow her <font color="a6aafb">Spirit Lantern</font>. After Zhuxin stops channeling <font color="a6aafb">Lantern Flare</font>, the <font color="a6aafb">Crimson Butterflies</font> will gradually disappear, each restoring 3% of her Max Mana.
Zhuxin has a naturally high base Max Mana, but it doesn't scale with her level.

skill.name: Fluttering Grace
skill.description: Zhuxin deals 150<font color="62f8fe"> (+30% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> to all enemies in a fan-shaped area and applies 1 stack(s) of <font color="a6aafb">Soul Snare</font>. Zhuxin also slows all enemy heroes hit by 20% and gains 20% of extra Movement Speed herself for 1.5s.

skill.name: Lantern Flare
skill.description:
<font color="a6aafb">Hold</font>: Hold the skill button to move the <font color="a6aafb">Spirit Lantern</font>. It deals 35<font color="62f8fe"> (+30% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> to all enemies in range every 0.33s (Magic Power increases to 60% against Minions) and applies <font color="a6aafb">Soul Snare</font> to enemy heroes hit. When an enemy hero reaches 10 stacks of <font color="a6aafb">Soul Snare</font>, the <font color="a6aafb">Crimson Butterflies</font> capture them, pulling them airborne for 1s.

<font color="a6aafb">Release</font>: Throw all captured enemies to the target location, dealing 200<font color="62f8fe"> (+150% Total Magic Power)</font> + 10% of the captured target's Max HP as <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> to all enemies in the area. If an enemy is hit multiple times, subsequent hits deal 80% less damage.

After a target is captured, <font color="a6aafb">Soul Snare</font> cannot stack on them again for 4s. During this time, this skill deals 15% increased damage to that target.

skill.name: Crimson Beacon
skill.description: Zhuxin blinks to the target location while gaining a 400<font color="62f8fe"> (+100% Total Magic Power)</font> shield. While flying, she creates a field around her for 6s. The field deals 30<font color="62f8fe"> (+10% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> and applies 1 stack of <font color="a6aafb">Soul Snare</font> to enemies every 0.5s.

skill_combo.title: LANING COMBOS
skill_combo.description: In the laning phase, use Zhuxin's 1st Skill to slow the opponent and increase her own Movement Speed, then use her 2nd Skill from a safe position and try to hit the Minions and the opponent at the same time to both poke and clear the lane. Once the enemy has enough stacks, throw them into the Minions for additional damage.

skill_combo.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS
skill_combo.description: In teamfights, use Zhuxin's Ultimate to blink into a good position, then follow up with her 1st Skill to slow the enemy team and use her 2nd Skill to build stacks at a safe distance. Try to capture as many enemies as possible with her 2nd Skill, then throw them out of position while also grouping them up.

lore.story: An exorcist from Zhu'an who has inherited the power of the Immortal Nuo.

skill.name: Transient Immortal
skill.description:
<font color="a6aafb">Tap-casting</font> any skill will put Suyou in his Mortal form, granting him 40 Movement Speed and decreasing the interval between Basic Attacks.
<font color="a6aafb">Hold-casting</font> any skill will put Suyou in his Immortal form, increasing the damage of Basic Attacks to 125% and granting him 20% Physical Damage Reduction. In this form, for every 20 extra Physical Attack Suyou has, he gains 1% Physical Damage Reduction (up to 40%).

skill.name: Blade Surge
skill.description:
<font color="a6aafb">Tap</font>: Suyou throws his weapon in the target direction, dealing 250<font color="fba51f"> (+100% Extra Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to enemies in its path. Suyou then blinks to the weapon's location, catches it, and performs a slash in the opposite direction, dealing 375<font color="fba51f"> (+150% Extra Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>.
<font color="a6aafb">Hold</font>: Suyou channels the Immortal's power and charges in the target direction, dealing 250<font color="fba51f"> (+100% Extra Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to enemies along the path. When hitting an enemy hero, he stops and stuns enemies in a rectangular area in front for 0.6s. The charge distance increases with the hold time.
<font color="A4AAC7">Suyou can be controlled while charging, but the skill cannot be interrupted</font>.

skill.name: Soul Sever
skill.description:
<font color="a6aafb">Tap</font>: Suyou performs a sweeping attack with his weapon, dealing <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> equal to 300<font color="fba51f"> (+200% Extra Physical Attack)</font> plus 15% of target's Lost HP to enemies in a fan-shaped area.
<font color="a6aafb">Hold</font>: Suyou channels the power of the Immortal to perform 3 cleaves in a fan-shaped area. The first two strikes deal 250<font color="fba51f"> (+80% Extra Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> each, while the final strike deals 400<font color="fba51f"> (+128% Extra Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> and recovers 150<font color="fba51f"> (+50% Extra Physical Attack)</font> HP for himself.

skill.name: Evil Queller
skill.description:
<font color="a6aafb">Tap</font>: Suyou glides backward and swings his weapon in the target direction, dealing 420<font color="fba51f"> (+120% Extra Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to enemies in a rectangular area and on his path backward, and reducing their Movement Speed by 30% for 1.5s.
<font color="a6aafb">Hold</font>: Suyou uses the Immortal's power to shoot a deadly arrow in the target direction, dealing 580<font color="fba51f"> (+165% Extra Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to the target hit. The range increases with the hold time. 
<font color="A4AAC7">Suyou can be controlled while charging, but the skill cannot be interrupted</font>.

skill_combo.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS
skill_combo.description: Hold-cast Skill 3 to poke before the team fight, then hold-cast Skill 1 to engage and control the enemy at their back, then hold-cast Skill 2 to deal massive damage. Then tap-cast Skill 3 to keep your distance from the enemy, and when the skill cooldown is up, tap-cast Skill 1 and Skill 2 to quickly kill the target.

skill_combo.title: LANING COMBOS
skill_combo.description: Hold-casting Skill 1 in the Bush allows Suyou to attack unexpectedly and control the enemy; then hold-cast Skill 2 to deal massive damage and follow up the Basic Attack by tap-casting Skill 3 to leave the battlefield.

lore.story: A legendary Sacred Beast that can take the form of a rambunctious young man.

skill.name: Hero's Resolve
skill.description:
Lukas gains 0.5 Resolve per second and an additional 2 Resolve when attacking heroes.

Lukas consumes 10 Resolve per second while in [Sacred Beast] form.

skill.name: Flash Combo
skill.description:
<font color="a6aafb">Passive</font>: Basic Attacks enhance <font color="a6aafb">Flash Combo</font> up to 2 times, lasting 4s.
Lukas consumes all Vigor to unleash Pulverize, dealing 220<font color="fba51f"> (+120% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> and recovering 5% of his Max HP when hitting a hero or minion.
<font color="a6aafb">1 Stack</font>: Lukas briefly stuns the target and spins his tonfa hammers to deal 100<font color="fba51f"> (+45% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> 3 times, pulling the enemy toward him.
<font color="a6aafb">2 Stacks</font>: Lukas briefly stuns the target and follows up with 2 attacks that deal 50<font color="fba51f"> (+20% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> each. He then spins his tonfa hammers to deal 100<font color="fba51f"> (+45% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> 3 times, gaining Control Immunity during this period.

skill.name: Flash Step
skill.description:
Lukas dashes in the target direction and turns his next Basic Attack within 4s into <font color="a6aafb">Flash Strike</font>.
<font color="a6aafb">Flash Strike</font>: Lukas blinks behind the enemy, dealing 60<font color="fba51f"> (+125% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>. He then gains increased Attack Range, 20% Movement Speed and Attack Speed, and his Basic Attacks trigger lightning storms to deal 50<font color="fba51f"> (+25% Total Physical Attack)</font> extra <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>, lasting for 4s.

skill.name: Unleash the Beast
skill.description:
Lukas transforms into his <font color="a6aafb">Sacred Beast</font> form (briefly gains Control Immunity). His base Movement Speed is increased by 30, all attributes are increased by 15%, and his skills gain new effects.
<font color="a6aafb">Use Again</font>: Fires a Shockwave Blast in the target direction that will explode upon hitting an enemy hero or reaching its maximum range, dealing 450<font color="fba51f"> (+155% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>.
<font color="A4AAC7">All attributes: HP, Physical Attack, Attack Speed, Physical & Magic Defense, and Attack Range.</font>

skill.name: Hero's Resolve
skill.description:
Lukas gains 0.5 Resolve per second and an additional 2 Resolve when attacking heroes.

Lukas consumes 10 Resolve per second while in [Sacred Beast] form.

skill.name: Flash Combo
skill.description:
<font color="a6aafb">Passive</font>: Basic Attacks enhance <font color="a6aafb">Flash Combo</font> up to 2 times, lasting 4s.
Lukas consumes all Vigor to unleash a tail swing, dealing 220<font color="fba51f"> (+120% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> and recovers 5% of his Max HP when hitting a hero.
<font color="a6aafb">1 Stack</font>: Lukas briefly stuns the target and pounces to deal 100<font color="fba51f"> (+45% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> 3 times, knocking the enemy back.
<font color="a6aafb">2 Stacks</font>: Lukas briefly stuns the target and leaps to deal 50<font color="fba51f"> (+20% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> 2 times, then summons sacred lightning, dealing 100<font color="fba51f"> (+45% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> 3 times, and gaining Control Immunity during this period.

skill.name: Flash Step
skill.description:
Lukas dashes in the target direction and turns his next Basic Attack within 4s into <font color="a6aafb">Lightning Clash</font>.

<font color="a6aafb">Lightning Clash</font>: Lukas charges toward the enemy, knocking them back and dealing 60<font color="fba51f"> (+125% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>. He then gains 20% Movement Speed and Attack Speed, and summons sacred lightning with Basic Attacks to deal 50<font color="fba51f"> (+25% Total Physical Attack)</font> extra <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>, lasting for 4s.

skill.name: Shockwave Blast
skill.description: The Sacred Beast fires a Shockwave Blast in the target direction (gains Control Immunity during the cast) that will explode upon hitting an enemy hero or reaching its maximum range, dealing 450<font color="fba51f"> (+155% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>.

skill_combo.title: LANING COMBOS
skill_combo.description: Lukas should use his 2nd Skill to close in on the enemy, then use the enhanced Basic Attack plus another Basic Attack to get 2 stacks of Vigor. Now use his fully powered 1st Skill to inflict high damage and stun and displace the target, then back off to avoid the enemy's counterattack.

skill_combo.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS
skill_combo.description: In Sacred Beast form, use Lukas's 2nd Skill followed by an enhanced Basic Attack, then another Basic Attack to get 2 stacks of Vigor. Use his 1st Skill to inflict high damage and CC, and finish off with Shockwave Blast to devastate the enemy with a massive AOE attack.

lore.story: With her serpent tail, this proud descendant of the Great Serpent swims gracefully through the Vonetis Sea, aspiring to one day carry the full power of her heritage.

skill.name: Surge of Life
skill.description:
After casting a skill, Kalea creates a <font color="a6aafb">Water Zone</font> on the ground. When Kalea casts a skill within this zone, she will absorb the Water Zone to enhance her next three Basic Attacks with different effects:
First Basic Attack: Kalea dashes to the target, dealing <font color="fba51f"> (+100% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>.
Second Basic Attack: Kalea unleashes a flurry of attacks, dealing 200<font color="fba51f"> (+100% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> and recovering 40<font color="26e407"> (+10% Total HP)</font>  <font color="62f8fe">(+60% Total Magic Power)</font> HP for herself and the nearby ally with the lowest HP.
Third Basic Attack: Kalea uses her tail to strike the area around her target, dealing 100<font color="fba51f"> (+100% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> and creating a new <font color="a6aafb">Water Zone</font>. Enhanced Basic Attacks are not affected by Attack Speed.

skill.name: Wavebreaker
skill.description: Kalea slams her fist into the ground, creating a wave that deals 200<font color="26e407"> (+5% Total HP)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to nearby enemies and slows them by 40% for 1.5s.

skill.name: Tidal Strike
skill.description:
Kalea charges forward and body slams the first enemy hero she encounters, knocking them airborne for 0.6s (unaffected by Resilience) while dealing 150<font color="fba51f"> (+60% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>.
If she collides with an obstacle or touches the edge of a <font color="a6aafb">Water Zone</font> during her charge, Kalea will leap into the air. Cast the skill again to slam down at a target location, dealing 150<font color="fba51f"> (+60% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> and knocking enemies airborne for 0.6s (unaffected by Resilience).

skill.name: Tsunami Slam
skill.description: Kalea grabs an enemy hero with her tail and slams them down in the Joystick's direction (drag the Joystick to change landing spot). She gains Control Immunity during this process. Upon landing, deals 300<font color="fba51f"> (+80% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to the target and nearby enemies.

skill_combo.title: Laning Combos
skill_combo.description: While ganking with Kalea, use her 2nd Skill to close in and CC the target, then use her 1st Skill to activate her enhanced Basic Attacks and unleash them on the target.

skill_combo.title: Teamfight Combos
skill_combo.description: In teamfights, Kalea should prioritize enemy Mages or Marksmen. Use the first part of her 2nd Skill to dash into an obstacle near the target, then dive down to CC them, and follow up with her Ultimate to slam them into your team. Use her 1st Skill to trigger her Passive, and unload her enhanced Basic Attacks on the target.

lore.story: Recognized by the Heavens and cherished by her people, the Celestial Empress of the Cadia Riverlands ascends to bring peace to the mortal realm.

skill.name: Celestial Armament
skill.description:
<font color="a6aafb">Phoenix Crown</font>: When Zetian hits enemy heroes with <font color="a6aafb">Phoenix Strike</font> or <font color="a6aafb">Phoenix Descent</font>, she gains 1% Spell Vamp for 5s, stacking up to 10 times.
<font color="a6aafb">Celestial Robe</font>: The power of the Phoenix periodically protects Zetian, knocking back and stunning any enemy hero who dares approach her while dealing 90(+10*Hero Level)<font color="62f8fe"> (+50% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> to them. She also gains a 300(+20*Hero Level)<font color="62f8fe"> (+50% Total Magic Power)</font> Shield that lasts 3s. This effect has a 120s cooldown.

skill.name: Phoenix Strike
skill.description:
Zetian unleashes a <font color="a6aafb">Phoenix Wave</font> in the target direction. If it hits an enemy, she automatically casts another wave, up to 3 times. While casting, Zetian can use other skills.

The 1st, 2nd, and 3rd <font color="a6aafb">Phoenix Waves</font> deal 150<font color="62f8fe"> (+50% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font>, 150<font color="62f8fe"> (+50% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font>, and 360<font color="62f8fe"> (+120% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font>, respectively. The third wave has a larger area and pulls enemies toward the cast direction (not considered a control effect).

The Spell Vamp ratio is limited to 65% against Minions.

skill.name: Phoenix Descent
skill.description:
Zetian summons a <font color="a6aafb">Phoenix Spirit</font> at the target location, dealing 150<font color="62f8fe"> (+45% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> and applying a brief 50% slow effect to enemies in the area. The <font color="a6aafb">Phoenix Spirit</font> hovers at the location for 3s, dealing 20<font color="62f8fe"> (+10% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> every 0.5s and reducing enemies' Magic Defense by 10% while revealing their surrounding area.
While the <font color="a6aafb">Phoenix Spirit</font> is active, Zetian can use this skill again to command it to charge toward a designated location, dealing 150<font color="62f8fe"> (+45% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> and applying a brief 50% slow effect upon arrival.

skill.name: Fury of the Phoenix
skill.description:
Zetian calls upon her divine mandate and the hearts of her people, granting all allied heroes 40% Movement Speed that gradually decays over 3s, while bringing divine retribution upon all enemy heroes, dealing 400<font color="62f8fe"> (+100% Total Magic Power)</font> <font color="7f62fe">Magic Damage</font> and stunning them for 0.8s. Zetian gains vision of all enemy heroes during this time.
Zetian can cast other skills while channeling this skill.

skill_combo.title: Teamfight Combos
skill_combo.description: In teamfights, use Zetian's Ultimate to boost her team's Movement Speed and launch the global attack, then immediately use her 2nd Skill to slow enemies, making it easier for the Ultimate to land. Follow-up with her 1st Skill for more AoE, and recast the 2nd Skill if enemies try to leave its range.

skill_combo.title: Laning Combos
skill_combo.description: In the laning phase, Use Zetian's 2nd Skill to slow the enemy and reduce their Magic Defense, then use her 1st Skill while moving to reposition and deal sustained damage. If enemies leave the area of the 2nd Skill, use it again to move the Phoenix on top of them.

lore.story: The ancient Sovereign of the Abyss, risen from ruin, now seeks to slay the God of Darkness and hunt down its Spawns of Decay.

skill.name: Return to Bone
skill.description:
Obsidia gains <font color="a6aafb">Bone Energy</font> whenever she deals damage. Basic Attacks grant 1 Energy against non-hero units and 2 against hero units. Skills grant Energy equal to 3 times the amount granted by Basic Attacks against the same unit type. No Energy is gained from hitting creeps.

When <font color="a6aafb">Bone Energy</font> reaches 30, it forms a <font color="a6aafb">Bone Shard</font>, up to 25 shards. Killing an enemy hero directly grants 1 <font color="a6aafb">Bone Shard(s)</font>. When Obsidia uses Basic Attacks, all <font color="a6aafb">Bone Shards</font> strike the target, each dealing <font color="fba51f"> (+6% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> and inheriting 6% Attack Effects.

 Obsidia's Basic Attacks deal 70<font color="fba51f"> (+70% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>, inheriting 100% Attack Effects.

skill.name: Abyssal Bone Needle
skill.description: Obsidia launches an <font color="a6aafb">Abyssal Bone Needle</font>, dealing 325<font color="fba51f"> (+80% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to enemies hit and triggering <font color="a6aafb">Return to Bone</font> on the first enemy hero struck.

skill.name: Phantom Shadowmeld
skill.description: Obsidia descends into the Abyss and enters <font color="a6aafb">Shadowmeld Form</font>, gaining 500% Movement Speed for 0.3s.

skill.name: Hunt of Bone
skill.description:
Obsidia shoots <font color="a6aafb">Bones of Wrath</font> in the target direction, dealing 125<font color="fba51f"> (+60% Extra Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>, briefly stunning the first enemy hero hit, and pulling herself to the target. The <font color="a6aafb">Bones of Wrath</font> then tether Obsidia to the enemy, preventing her from moving more than 4 units away. While tethered, the enemy cannot use displacement skills, and their movement will drag Obsidia along. During this time, Obsidia gains 5 temporary <font color="a6aafb">Bone Shard(s)</font> and 30% Attack Speed. This effect lasts 3s.

While tethered, Obsidia can move through obstacles and use Basic Attacks while moving. <font color="a6aafb">Phantom Shadowmeld</font> is enhanced, with its duration increased to 1s and cooldown reduced to 33%.

skill_combo.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS
skill_combo.description: During teamfights, use Obsidia's Basic Attacks and 1st Skill to poke the enemy, and her 2nd Skill to reposition herself. Look for opportunities to close in on a target with her Ultimate and pick them off with your team. Finally, use her mobility and powerful Basic Attacks to clean up the remaining enemies.

skill_combo.title: Laning Combos
skill_combo.description: During the laning phase, use Obsidia's 1st Skill often on enemy Minions and heroes to quickly stack her Passive. When the enemy's HP drops low enough, use Obsidia's 2nd Skill and Ultimate on them and finish them off with Basic Attacks.

lore.story: A pure and free-spirited boy with unshakeable resolve, drifting across the golden sands.

skill.name: Mystic Surge
skill.description:
Sora can ascend to <font color="a6aafb">Thunder</font> or <font color="a6aafb">Torrent</font> by using his Ultimate. After ascending, dealing damage to heroes or summoned units grants 1 stack of <font color="a6aafb">Cloudstep</font>. Upon reaching 5 stacks, he unlocks his True Art.

<font color="a6aafb">Thunder</font>: Adopts an assassin style, converting 30% Max HP into Physical Attack (Equal to 10% of Max HP).
<font color="a6aafb">Torrent</font>: Adopts a tank style, converting 30% Physical Attack into Max HP (Gains 10 HP for every 1 Attack).

skill.name: Sundering Strike
skill.description: Sora strikes twice, dealing 140<font color="fba51f"> (+50% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>, then lunges forward, dealing 240<font color="26e407"> (+5% Total HP)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>. He can dash after striking.

skill.name: Windstride
skill.description: Sora leaps forward, dealing 140<font color="fba51f"> (+55% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>. If he hits an enemy hero or reaches max range, he slams the ground, dealing an additional 140<font color="26e407"> (+8% Total HP)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> and slowing them by 40% for 0.5s. Successful hits reduce the cooldown by 2s.

skill.name: Shifting Skies
skill.description:
Swipe left to ascend into <font color="a6aafb">Thunder</font> for 10s. Sora gains a brief bonus Movement Speed and becomes untargetable. He then summons lightning to strike nearby enemies 3 time(s), each dealing 140<font color="fba51f"> (+50% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>.

Swipe right to ascend into <font color="a6aafb">Torrent</font> for 10s. Sora gains Control Immunity. After a short delay, he pulls nearby enemies in and deals 250<font color="26e407"> (+8% Total HP)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>.

skill.name: Mystic Surge
skill.description:
Sora can ascend to <font color="a6aafb">Thunder</font> or <font color="a6aafb">Torrent</font> by using his Ultimate. After ascending, dealing damage to heroes or summoned units grants 1 stack of <font color="a6aafb">Cloudstep</font>. Upon reaching 5 stacks, he unlocks his True Art.

<font color="a6aafb">Thunder</font>: Adopts an assassin style, converting 30% Max HP into Physical Attack (Equal to 10% of Max HP).
<font color="a6aafb">Torrent</font>: Adopts a tank style, converting 30% Physical Attack into Max HP (Gains 10 HP for every 1 Attack).

skill.name: Sundering Strike - Thunderflash
skill.description: Sora strikes four times, dealing 140<font color="fba51f"> (+50% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>, then lunges forward, dealing 240<font color="26e407"> (+5% Total HP)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>. He can move freely during this skill.

skill.name: Windstride - Thunder Rush
skill.description: Sora leaps forward, dealing 140<font color="fba51f"> (+55% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>. Upon hitting a hero or reaching the max distance, he summons a thunderstorm, dealing 140<font color="26e407"> (+8% Total HP)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> and slowing enemies by 50% for 0.5s. This skill can be cast again within 4s if it hits an enemy.

skill.name: Heaven's Wrath
skill.description: Sora leaps into the air and strikes a target area 16 time(s), dealing 60<font color="fba51f"> (+40% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> with each hit. Sora can move freely and ignore terrain during this skill.

skill.name: Mystic Surge
skill.description:
Sora can ascend to <font color="a6aafb">Thunder</font> or <font color="a6aafb">Torrent</font> by using his Ultimate. After ascending, dealing damage to heroes or summoned units grants 1 stack of <font color="a6aafb">Cloudstep</font>. Upon reaching 5 stacks, he unlocks his True Art.

<font color="a6aafb">Thunder</font>: Adopts an assassin style, converting 30% Max HP into Physical Attack (Equal to 10% of Max HP).
<font color="a6aafb">Torrent</font>: Adopts a tank style, converting 30% Physical Attack into Max HP (Gains 10 HP for every 1 Attack).

skill.name: Sundering Strike - Overwhelm
skill.description: Sora strikes twice, dealing 140<font color="fba51f"> (+50% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> and slowing enemies for 40%. He then lunges forward, dealing 240<font color="26e407"> (+5% Total HP)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>, stunning enemies for 0.5s.

skill.name: Windstride - Skyfall
skill.description: Sora leaps forward, dealing 140<font color="fba51f"> (+55% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>, knocking enemies airborne, and knocking them back to the landing point. He then smashes the ground, knocking enemies airborne again for 0.5s, dealing 140<font color="26e407"> (+8% Total HP)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>, and slowing them by 50% for 1s. Hits reduce cooldown by 2s.

skill.name: Stormbind
skill.description: Sora leaps into the air and strikes the target area 5 time(s), dealing 100<font color="26e407"> (+6% Total HP)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> and briefly stunning enemies with each hit. Sora can move freely and ignore terrain during this skill.

skill_combo.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS
skill_combo.description: In mid-to-late game teamfights, Sora is able to adapt to different situations. He can ascend to Thunder form to dive the enemy backline, or Torrent form to become a CC machine and take control of the battlefield.

skill_combo.title: LANING COMBOS
skill_combo.description: When the opponent is focused on clearing Minions, poke them with Sora's 1st Skill, then use his 2nd Skill to create distance. Use the mobility from his 1st and 2nd Skill to effectively kite enemies. Sora's damage is reliant on hitting with his 1st Skill.

lore.story: Hailing from House Paxley, he is an elegant, mysterious, and bizarre artist whose split soul has fused with his camera.

skill.name: Platinum Snap
skill.description:
Marcel's split soul, <font color="a6aafb">Clemar</font>, enters the camera to freeze the moment. Marcel's Basic Attacks deal 50<font color="fba51f"> (+40% Total Physical Attack)</font><font color="62f8fe">(+40% Total Magic Defense)</font><font color="fba51f"><1065 0.4></font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> but cannot Crit. He cannot benefit from extra Attack Speed. Extra HP is converted into 1.5% Hybrid Defense.

<font color="a6aafb">Clemar</font> automatically snaps photos of enemy heroes near Marcel, causing a brief frozen moment and dealing <font color="ffe63c">True Damage</font> equal to 5%+20 of their Max HP (can trigger Attack Effects). It also grants a shield of the same value to Marcel and a nearby allied hero. This effect has a 12s cooldown per target (each Basic Attack by Marcel reduces that target's cooldown by 1s).

skill.name: Framed Moment
skill.description: <font color="a6aafb">Clemar</font> focuses on an area around Marcel, slowing enemy heroes in range by 20%. After 2.5s, he completes the shot, dealing 400<font color="fba51f"> (+50% Total Physical Attack)</font><font color="62f8fe">(+100% Total Magic Defense)</font><font color="fba51f"><1065 1></font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> to enemies within range and immobilizing them for 1s.

skill.name: Tracking Shot
skill.description:
Artist inspiration time! Marcel enters the <font color="a6aafb">Tracking Haste</font> state for 3s, gaining 15% Movement Speed. This bonus increases to 75% when moving toward an enemy hero.

<font color="a6aafb">Use Again</font>: Marcel dashes in the target direction, leaving a framing phantom behind. If <font color="a6aafb">Framed Moment</font> is active, <font color="a6aafb">Clemar</font> remains at the original location to continue shooting.

skill.name: Golden Hour
skill.description:
Marcel and <font color="a6aafb">Clemar</font> perform a joint shoot. After a short delay, Clemar takes a wide-angle shot of a designated area for 3s. During this time, Marcel enters the <font color="a6aafb">Tracking Haste</font> state while inside the area. All other units in the area are put into a frozen moment and are immune to all effects except from Marcel. All ranged Basic Attacks and projectiles are also frozen and will resolve after a delay.

Golden Hour resets the cooldown of <font color="a6aafb">Platinum Snap</font> for each enemy hero.

skill_combo.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS
skill_combo.description: In teamfights, Marcel should activate his 2nd Skill, followed by his 1st Skill. Run into the enemy's formation, then use the 2nd Skill again to dash away and drop his 1st Skill on top of them. Once the enemies are immobilized, use his Ultimate.

skill_combo.title: LANING COMBOS
skill_combo.description: During the laning phase, use Marcel's 2nd Skill to run up to the enemy and cast his 1st Skill. While the enemy is immobilized, lay into them with Basic Attacks.
